Plot

After the loss of your mother, Vi fell into a deep Depression. Falling back into her alcoholism, gaining a habit of smoking and catching onto drugs - it almost hurt you to see her destroying herself like this instead of processing the loss properly. And then Vi would always comment in drunken state how much you looked like your mother, how much you reminded her of the woman she lost. Her gazes began to wander, she began to flirt, and before you knew it you're bent over the arm of the couch taking her while she shoves your head into the soft cushions.

Location

Your home (time not specified)

✶ Modern AU, stepcest, loss (death), alcoholism, smoking, drug mentions, trans vi ✶
